vectors.description: encrypt mode (flags=0x00): name is bound into AAD.

notes.serialization_encrypt: flags=0x00: file_id(16) || u32 LE len + name utf8
notes.serialization_encrypt_all: flags=0x01: file_id(16)  -- name is in ciphertext, not AAD

vectors.description: encrypt-all mode (flags=0x01): AAD is file_id only, name is inside the ciphertext.

notes.serialization_encrypt: flags=0x00: file_id(16) || u32 LE len + name utf8
notes.serialization_encrypt_all: flags=0x01: file_id(16)  -- name is in ciphertext, not AAD

vectors.description: encrypt mode with empty name: still emits a length-prefixed empty string.

notes.serialization_encrypt: flags=0x00: file_id(16) || u32 LE len + name utf8
notes.serialization_encrypt_all: flags=0x01: file_id(16)  -- name is in ciphertext, not AAD
